_comment: Offline-authored responsive-search-ad copy (stage 6, decision 3). Keyed by '{language}:{theme_key}'. Preferred by AdGenerationService when the entry passes RsaValidator; anything absent or invalid falls back to the deterministic template engine, so the deployed host needs no AI credentials. Authored locally with a Claude Code CLI. Headlines <=30 chars, descriptions <=90; the app re-validates before storing.
